name: Triana - Los Remedios 5K "Torre Sevilla"
summary: Compact 5K sharing the closing half of the Triana - Los Remedios event, from Blas Infante back to Torre Sevilla.
heroNote: Spectators can move between Plaza de Cuba, Calle Betis, and the final riverfront approach without leaving the core of the course.
specialNote: The listed start time is approximate. This 5K starts when the 10K race reaches the 5K mark, so the exact start may shift slightly on race day.
